package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for copy_append_idiom_waste: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `dst = append(dst, src...)` when `dst` is known empty and `len(src)` is known
type CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteModel
}

type CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteService struct {
    repo *CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveCopyAppendIdiomWaste(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteDTO) error {
    focus := "copy_append_idiom_waste"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var copied []CaseCopyAppendIdiomWasteDTO
    for _, item := range items { copied = append(copied, item) }
    copy_append_idiom_waste_positive := map[string]int{"copy": 1, "append": 2, "idiom": 3, "waste": 4}
    copy_append_idiom_waste_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    copy_positive_0 := copy_append_idiom_waste_positive["copy"] + len(input)
    _ = copy_positive_0
    append_positive_1 := copy_append_idiom_waste_positive["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_positive_1
    idiom_positive_2 := copy_append_idiom_waste_positive["idiom"] + len(input)
    _ = idiom_positive_2
    waste_positive_3 := copy_append_idiom_waste_positive["waste"] + len(input)
    _ = waste_positive_3
    return nil
}
